items.description: Fruit salad is a versatile dish made of various, chopped fresh or canned fruits—such as berries, melons, citrus, and grapes—often mixed with a light dressing of fruit juice, syrup, or yogurt. It is commonly served as a refreshing snack, side dish, or dessert, frequently during warmer months
